name: GMRC – General Manager, Joint General Manager and More – 5 Posts

basic_details.job_title: GMRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for General Manager, Joint General Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRC) Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Various Civil. Candidates with B.E/ B.Tech, Diploma Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through GMRC official website gujaratmetrorail.com.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/ B.Tech in Civil Engineering, Graduate in Civil/ Mechanical/ Electrical Engineering along with Diploma in Industrial Safety

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GMRC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
